author.bio: @IPFSbot Project Lead and PM @ProtocolLabs. Building #Web3 to be #p2p & #OfflineFirst. Former (A)PM @Google on #GoogleSearch, #GoogleClassroom, #GoogleForms.
author.name: Molly

content.text: Want a lightweight way to power all your ipfs website browsing (AND manage your pins on ipfs?) check out ipfs-desktop which is looking GREAT after all @hacdias‘s hard work! Used in conjunction with the ipfs-companion extension it’s 👌

author.bio: Studying Computer Engineering at @istecnico. Digging into the decentralized web at @ProtocolLabs. #opensource advocate.
